benefits.description: Lost 10 lbs in approximately 8 weeks on reta; starting weight 135 lbs, current weight 125 lbs

side_effects.description: Noticed increased vascularity on hands, feet, inside of elbows, and forehead after losing 10 lbs on reta over 8 weeks

protocol_notes: Female, 5'4", starting weight 135 lbs, current weight 125 lbs. Lost 10 lbs in ~8 weeks on reta. Not described as super lean. Increased vascularity noted on extremities and face.
